\tzpentry{ID4715}{Text Resonance Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4715 introduces Text Resonance Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\nf_\\text{resonance} = f_0 \\sqrt{1 + n^2\\left(\\frac{\\lambda_\\text{acoustic}}{\\lambda_\\text{KK}}\\right)^2}\n\\end{equation}
